query:
_sourceCategory=asoc/INSIGHT*   {{{keywords}}}
| _messageid as mid
//| json field=_raw "id"
| json field=_raw "name"
| json field=_raw "readableId"
| json field=_raw "description"
| json field=_raw "source"
| json field=_raw "created"
| json field=_raw "closed"
| json field=_raw "severity"
| json field=_raw "confidence"
| json field=_raw "status.name" as status nodrop
//| json field=_raw "entity"
| json field=_raw "entity.entityType" as entityType nodrop
| json field=_raw "entity.name" as entityName nodrop
| json field=_raw "timeToDetection" nodrop
| json field=_raw "timeToResponse" nodrop
| json field=_raw "timeToRemediation" nodrop
| json field=_raw "assignee.username" as assignee nodrop
| json field=_raw "tags" nodrop
| json field=_raw "signals[*].name" as signalNames
| json field=_raw "signals[*].stage" as signalstages
| json field=_raw "signals[*].ruleId" as  signalruleIds
| formatdate(tolong(_messagetime),"yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss ZZZZ") as time
| count by name,description,source,severity ,confidence ,tags ,readableid,status, entitytype,entityName ,signalNames ,signalstages, signalruleIds //timeToDetection,timeToResponse,timeToRemediation,
//| where status = "new"
//| count as insights by name, description,source,severity,entitytype
//| parse regex field=signalstages "\"(?<signalstage>[^\",]+)\"" multi
| count_distinct(readableid) as count, values(readableid) as insights, values(entitytype) as types by entityName | sort entityName asc
